## Summary of Changes
- 

## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat`: New feature
- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation
- [ ] `refactor`: Refactor
- [ ] `chore`: Dependencies / Tooling

## Quality & Security Verification
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passed with 0 errors
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passed with 0 warnings
- [ ] `pnpm build` completed successfully
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
- [ ] DB migration included (if schema changed)
- [ ] Audit log entry recorded (if financial/state mutation)
